name: IdsEdwOpsDrctrDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_main AS (SELECT DRCTR.OPS_DRCTR_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK')) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') END AS SRC_SYS_CD, DRCTR.OPS_DRCTR_ID, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, DRCTR.OPS_VP_SK, DRCTR.OPS_DRCTR_NM, DRCTR.USER_ID, DRCTR.LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.OPS_DRCTR AS DRCTR LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG AS CD ON DRCTR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE DRCTR.OPS_DRCTR_SK <> 0 AND DRCTR.OPS_DRCTR_SK <> 1), cte_UNK AS (SELECT 0 AS OPS_DRCTR_SK, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 'UNK' AS OPS_DRCTR_ID, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS OPS_VP_SK, 'UNK' AS OPS_DRCTR_NM, 'UNK' AS USER_ID, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK), cte_NA AS (SELECT 1 AS OPS_DRCTR_SK, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 'NA' AS OPS_DRCTR_ID, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 1 AS OPS_VP_SK, 'NA' AS OPS_DRCTR_NM, 'NA' AS USER_ID, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) SELECT * FROM cte_main UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_UNK UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_NA
